calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-10-2020 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-20-2020 Continued To Nov-10-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-01-2020 Continued To Oct-20-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stephen McDonagh appeared by zoom for and with Jeff Strobel (Petitioner) by zoom.

Mr. McDonagh presented oral argument to support his position with respect to why the requirement under Probate Code 9202 to provide notice to the Department of Health Services and the Victims Compensation Board does not apply to this case and why the interest rate of 4% should carry on the $500.00 bequest. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court informed Mr. McDonagh that he needs to submit pin-cite to support the 4% interest rate, and that it will require that notice be provided to the Department of Health Services and the Victims Compensation Board, or he needs to make allegation that notice is not required. The Court also stated that compensation on an estate needs to be sought in the estate, not in the trust and that he needs to amend the petition to request fees. The Amended Final Report, Accounting, etc. is continued to October 20, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jan-14-2020 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Dec-17-2019 Continued To Jan-14-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marta Eisenberg specially appearing for Attorney Steve McDonagh on behalf of Jeff Strobel.

Ms. Eisenberg requested a two-week continuance stating that this is an old probate, that Counsel is within days of filing a petition for final distribution and that it took a little longer to obtain the financial records. The Court informed Ms. Eisenberg that an inventory and appraisal is still needed. Status on close of estate is continued to January 14, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
